# Next.js app (oando-site)

## Why this folder exists

All application source for oando.co.in. Root scripts proxy here via pnpm --filter oando-site.

## What is here

- app/, features/, components/, lib/, tests/, scripts/, platform/, config/
- package.json, next.config.js, tsconfig.json
- results/ — active test and audit output

- `../../Readme.md`
